sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Star, Leaf, HeartPulse, Sparkles, Truck } from 'lucide-react'; import './Product.css'; // Default detail block for mocking const defaultDetails = { essenceQuote: '"A heirloom recipe passed down through generations, our Desi Gud is made by slowly reducing fresh sugarcane juice in shallow iron vats, retaining all natural minerals and its signature earthy caramel notes."', essenceDesc: 'Unlike refined sugar, our jaggery is unrefined and non-centrifuged. It is prepared using traditional methods without any sulfur or chemical clarificants. Each block is hand-poured, ensuring a texture that melts beautifully into your Masala Chai or morning porridge.', ingredients: ['Certified Sugarcane Juice', 'Wild Okra Stems (Natural Clarifier)'], nutrition: [ { label: 'Energy', value: '383 kcal' }, { label: 'Iron', value: '11.4 mg' }, { label: 'Magnesium', value: '80 mg' } ], reviewsData: [ { name: "Ananya R.", quote: "The depth of flavor is incomparable. It has this rich, smoky caramel undertone that you just don't get with store-bought jaggery.", stars: 5, initial: "A" }, { name: "Siddharth M.", quote: "Used it for my child's teething biscuits. Knowing it's 100% chemical-free gives me so much peace of mind.", stars: 5, initial: "S" }, { name: "Priya V.", quote: "The packaging is as beautiful as the product. Feels like receiving a luxury gift from nature itself.", stars: 5, initial: "P" } ], relatedData: [ { title: "A2 Bilona Ghee", desc: "Churned from grass-fed Gir cows.", price: "₹1,250.00", image: "/images/a2-ghee-jar.png" }, { title: "Wild Forest Honey", desc: "Raw, unpasteurized floral nectar.", price: "₹799.00", image: "/images/wild-honey.png" }, { title: "Masala Chai Blend", desc: "Stone-ground spices and CTC tea.", price: "₹450.00", image: "/images/chai-blend.png" } ] }; const productDatabase = { 'desi-gud': { title: 'Desi Gud', tag: 'ARTISANAL CHOICE', description: 'Hand-crafted chemical-free jaggery blocks from the heart of sugarcane belts.', price: 349.00, originalPrice: 499.00, discount: '30% OFF', reviews: 128, images: ['/images/desi-gud-main.png', '/images/desi-gud-thumb1.png', '/images/desi-gud-thumb2.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: '100% Organic' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Iron Rich' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'No Chemicals' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Direct Sourcing' }, ], details: defaultDetails }, 'desi-ghee': { title: 'Sona Desi Ghee', tag: 'PURE A2 GHEE', description: 'Traditional bilona churned ghee from happy A2 cows. Rich in aroma and nutrients.', price: 1250.00, originalPrice: 1500.00, discount: '15% OFF', reviews: 350, images: ['/images/desi-ghee.png', '/images/desi-ghee.png', '/images/desi-ghee.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: 'A2 Milk' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Heart Healthy' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'Bilona Method' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Farm Fresh' }, ], details: { ...defaultDetails, essenceQuote: '"Slow-churned to perfection using earthen pots and a wooden bilona, capturing the golden essence of pure A2 milk."', ingredients: ['100% Pure A2 Cow Milk Fat'], } }, 'kaju-jaggery': { title: 'Kaju Jaggery', tag: 'PREMIUM BLEND', description: 'Rich, nutty jaggery infused with premium cashews for an elegant sweet treat.', price: 499.00, originalPrice: 650.00, discount: '23% OFF', reviews: 84, images: ['/images/kaju-jaggery.png', '/images/kaju-jaggery.png', '/images/kaju-jaggery.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: 'Premium Nuts' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Energy Boost' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'Handcrafted' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Direct Sourcing' }, ], details: defaultDetails }, 'jaggery-powder': { title: 'Jaggery Powder', tag: 'VERSATILE ESSENTIAL', description: 'Fine-textured pure jaggery powder, the perfect healthy alternative to refined sugar.', price: 250.00, originalPrice: 300.00, discount: '16% OFF', reviews: 210, images: ['/images/jaggery-powder.png', '/images/jaggery-powder.png', '/images/jaggery-powder.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: 'Easy to dissolve' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Nutrient Rich' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'No Chemicals' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Direct Sourcing' }, ], details: defaultDetails }, 'dry-fruit-jaggery': { title: 'Dry Fruit Jaggery', tag: 'CURATED LUXURY', description: 'A decadent blend of traditional jaggery generously studded with almonds and pistachios.', price: 450.00, originalPrice: 550.00, discount: '18% OFF', reviews: 95, images: ['/images/featured-1.png', '/images/featured-1.png', '/images/featured-1.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: '100% Organic' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Almonds & Pistas' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'No Chemicals' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Direct Sourcing' }, ], details: defaultDetails }, 'traditional-desi-ghee': { title: 'Traditional Desi Ghee', tag: 'HERITAGE GHEE', description: 'Classic artisanal ghee housed in a beautiful traditional clay pot.', price: 1250.00, originalPrice: 1500.00, discount: '15% OFF', reviews: 412, images: ['/images/featured-2.png', '/images/featured-2.png', '/images/featured-2.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: 'A2 Milk' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Bilona Churned' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'Clay Pot Aged' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Direct Sourcing' }, ], details: defaultDetails }, 'royal-desi-gud': { title: 'Royal Desi Gud', tag: 'CURATED LUXURY', description: 'Perfectly formed rectangular blocks of premium grade heritage jaggery.', price: 320.00, originalPrice: 400.00, discount: '20% OFF', reviews: 156, images: ['/images/featured-3.png', '/images/featured-3.png', '/images/featured-3.png'], benefits: [ { id: 1, icon: , text: '100% Organic' }, { id: 2, icon: , text: 'Iron Rich' }, { id: 3, icon: , text: 'Handcrafted' }, { id: 4, icon: , text: 'Direct Sourcing' }, ], details: defaultDetails } }; const Product = () => { const { id } = useParams(); // Default to desi-gud if URL has unfamiliar ID const product = productDatabase[id] || productDatabase['desi-gud']; const [selectedWeight, setSelectedWeight] = useState('500g'); const [activeImage, setActiveImage] = useState(product.images[0]); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('essence'); // Re-sync image when navigating to a new product React.useEffect(() => { setActiveImage(product.images[0]); setActiveTab('essence'); // reset tab on product change }, [product]); return (
{/* Left Column: Image Gallery */}
{product.tag}
{product.images.slice(1).map((img, idx) => (
setActiveImage(img)} >
))}
{/* Right Column: Product Details */}
{[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => ( ))}
({product.reviews} Reviews)

{product.title}

{product.description}

₹{product.price.toFixed(2)} ₹{product.originalPrice.toFixed(2)} {product.discount}

SELECT WEIGHT

{product.benefits.map((benefit) => (
{benefit.icon} {benefit.text}
))}
{/* Product Extended Info Section (Tabs) */}
{activeTab === 'essence' && (

{product.details.essenceQuote}

{product.details.essenceDesc}

Pure Ingredients

    {product.details.ingredients.map((item, i) => (
  • {item}
    • ))}

Nutrition Facts

{product.details.nutrition.map((item, i) => (
{item.label} {item.value}
))}
)} {activeTab === 'ingredients' && (

Detailed ingredient information will go here.

)} {activeTab === 'benefits' && (

Extensive health benefits breakdown will go here.

)}
{/* Voices of Purity Section */}

Voices of Purity

What our atelier community has to say.

{product.details.reviewsData.map((review, idx) => (
{[...Array(review.stars)].map((_, i) => ( ))}

"{review.quote}"

{review.initial}
{review.name} Verified Collector
))}
{/* Pairs Beautifully Width Section (Full width colored wrapper) */}

Pairs beautifully with...

{product.details.relatedData.map((item, idx) => (

{item.title}

{item.desc}

{item.price}
))}
); }; export default Product;
